mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_questions ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_questions (exam_id, question_id, question_order, score, created_at) VALUES (#{examId}, #{questionId}, #{questionOrder}, #{score}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_questions exam_id = #{examId}, question_id = #{questionId}, question_order = #{questionOrder}, score = #{score}, WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_questions WHERE exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY question_order
SELECT * FROM exam_questions WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT * FROM exam_questions WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND question_order = #{questionOrder}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_questions WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_questions WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(score), 0) FROM exam_questions WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(question_order), 0) FROM exam_questions WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM exam_questions WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM exam_questions WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND question_order = #{questionOrder}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM exam_questions WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_questions SET question_order = #{newOrder} WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
UPDATE exam_questions SET score = #{score} WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
UPDATE exam_questions SET question_order = question_order - 1 WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND question_order > #{deletedOrder}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_questions WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND score = (SELECT MAX(eq2.score) FROM exam_questions eq2 WHERE eq2.exam_id = #{examId})
SELECT * FROM exam_questions WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND score = (SELECT MIN(eq2.score) FROM exam_questions eq2 WHERE eq2.exam_id = #{examId})
